author: gb9t
content: Phase C /loop iter 29: 2 Tier-3 xfrm docs (v6 transforms + HW offload). net/xfrm/ah-esp-ipv6.md (per-AF v6 IPSec transforms: AH RFC 4302 § 3.3.3.1.2 w/ extension-header walk + mutable-field-zero (HBH/RH/DestOpt mutable bits, IPv6 TC/FL/HL); RFC 8754 SR-Header AH support w/ SegmentsLeft zero-before-ICV; ESP RFC 4303 AEAD + separate cipher+auth modes; IPCOMP RFC 3173; transport+tunnel modes; esp6_offload HW path; xfrm6_protocol_register chain; xfrm6_tunnel — 13 REQ / 13 AC, 0 open) + net/xfrm/device.md (NIC offload via xfrmdev_ops vtable: xdo_dev_state_add/delete/free + offload_ok + advance_esn + policy_*; XFRM_OFFLOAD_IPV6/INBOUND/FULL/PACKET flags; struct xfrm_user_offload UAPI; per-SA xso state; offload-eligible-or-fallback gate; XFRM_GRO short-circuit; GSO pre-segmentation w/ NETIF_F_GSO_ESP; hot-unplug fallback to software — 11 REQ / 9 AC, 0 open). 13 upstream paths validated against baseline 27a26ccfd528. Total: ~97 .design docs. xfrm IPSec stack: 11 of 17 children done. Remaining: interface (XFRMi), iptfs, espintcp, nat-keepalive, bpf, compat (deferred). Next: net/xfrm/interface.md (XFRMi virtual netdev) + net/xfrm/espintcp.md (RFC 8229 IKE-over-TCP).
